lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ਵੇਖੁ ਹਜੂਰੇ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: pir rav rahiaa bharapoore vekh hajoore jug jug eko jaataa |
lines.english: The Lord is all-pervading everywhere; behold Him ever-present. Throughout the ages, know Him as the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਖਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin har ras chaakhiaa sabad subhaakhiaa har sar rahee bharapoore |
lines.english: One who tastes the sublime essence of the Lord, and utters the sublime Word of the Shabad, remains immersed in the Lord's Ambrosial Pool.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਬਾਲੀ ਭੋਲੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਾਵੈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhan baalee bholee pir sehaj raavai miliaa karam bidhaataa |
lines.english: The young, innocent bride enjoys her Husband Lord; she meets Him, the Architect of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਾਇ ਪੂਛਹੁ ਮੁਈਏ ਜਿਨੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee jaae poochhahu mueee jinee vichahu aap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Go and ask the happy soul-brides, O mortal bride, who have eradicated their self-conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਸਾ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਰਹੈ ਹਦੂਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kaaman saa pir bhaavai sabade rahai hadoore |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul bride is pleasing to her Husband Lord, who, through the Shabad, remains in His Presence. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਮੁਈਏ ਜਿਨੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: pir kaa hukam na paaeo mueee jinee vichahu aap na gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who have not eradicated their self-conceit, O mortal bride, do not realize the Hukam of their Husband Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਾਤੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa rang raatee sahaje maatee anadin naam vakhaanai |
lines.english: Ever imbued with His Love, in perfect poise and grace, she repeats His Name, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਤਿਨੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਰਲੀਆ ਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jinee aap gavaaeaa tinee pir paaeaa rang siau raleea maanai |
lines.english: Those who eradicate their self-conceit, obtain their Husband Lord; they delight in His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਾਤੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak kaaman sahaje raatee jin sach seegaar banaaeaa |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul-bride who is adorned with Truth, is imbued with her Lord's Love, in the state of perfect poise. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਸੁਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman vaddabhaagee antar liv laagee har kaa prem subhaaeaa |
lines.english: Very fortunate is that bride, who focuses her consciousness on Him; her Lord's Love is so sweet to her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਈਏ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har var raaveh sadaa mueee nij ghar vaasaa paae |
lines.english: Thus you shall ever enjoy your Husband Lord, O mortal bride, and obtain an abode in the home of your own inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮੁਈਏ ਤੂ ਚਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar mueee too chal gur kai bhaae |
lines.english: Overcome your egotism, O mortal bride, and walk in the Guru's Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਏ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਏ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaasaa paae sabad vajaae sadaa suhaagan naaree |
lines.english: Obtaining an abode in the home of her inner being, she vibrates the Word of the Shabad, and is a happy soul-bride forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਸੋਹਾਗੋ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੋ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har var sohaago masatak bhaago sachai sabad suhaae |
lines.english: Her Husband Lord activates the destiny written on her forehead, and she is adorned with the True Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਰਲੀਆਲਾ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਬਾਲਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਕੰਤਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: pir raleeaalaa joban baalaa anadin kant savaaree |
lines.english: The Husband Lord is delightful, and forever young; night and day, He embellishes His bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਭੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ਭਲਾ ਜੇ ਸਹਜੇ ਕੀਜੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sabh vaapaar bhalaa je sahaje keejai raam |
lines.english: All dealings of the Gurmukh are good, if they are accomplished with poise and grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਜਾ ਚਲੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਏ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kaaman har rang raatee jaa chalai satigur bhaae |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the soul-bride is imbued with the Love of the Lord, when she walks according to the Will of the True Guru. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਲੀਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਵੀਜੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa har ras leejai har raaveejai anadin naam vakhaanai |
lines.english: He earns the profit of the subtle essence of the Lord, meditating on the Lord, and repeating the Naam, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naam vakhaaneeai laahaa har ras peejai raam |
lines.english: Night and day, he repeats the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and he earns his profits, drinking in the subtle essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਵਿਕਣਹਿ ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gun sangreh avagan vikaneh aapai aap pachhaanai |
lines.english: He gathers in merits, and eliminates demerits, and realizes his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਾਲੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak har kee bhagat niraalee guramukh viralai keejai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, devotional worship of the Lord is wonderful, but only a few Gurmukhs perform it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramat paaee vaddee vaddiaaee sachai sabad ras peejai |
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, he is blessed with glorious greatness; he drinks in the essence of the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੇ ਘਰ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਭੁੰਚੁ ਤੂ ਲਾਹਾ ਲੈ ਪਰਥਾਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aapane ghar andar ras bhunch too laahaa lai parathaae raam |
lines.english: Within the home of your own being, enjoy the Lord's subtle essence, and earn profits in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖੇਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬੀਜੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਲੀਜੈ ਸਰੀਰਿ ਜਮਾਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh khetee har antar beejeeai har leejai sareer jamaae raam |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, plant the crop of the Lord within the field of your body, and let it grow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaae man vasaae boojhai gur beechaaraa |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord's Name, and enshrining Him within your mind, you shall come to understand the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਪਰਥਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਧਨੁ ਖੇਤੀ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa parathaae har man vasaae dhan khetee vaapaaraa |
lines.english: This profit is earned by enshrining the Lord within your mind; blessed is this farming and trade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੀਜਿ ਮਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam beej man andar sachai sabad subhaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, plant the seed of the Name within your mind, and adorn yourself with the True Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਖੇਤੀ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh khetee vanaj kar thaake trisanaa bhukh na jaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs have grown weary of this farming and trade; their hunger and thirst will not go away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਾਪਾਰਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਲਾਗੇ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਮਣੀ ਵਡਭਾਗੋ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har vaapaar se jan laage jinaa masatak manee vaddabhaago raam |
lines.english: Those humble beings engage in the Lord's Trade, who have the jewel of such pre-ordained destiny upon their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੈਰਾਗੋ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee man nij ghar vasiaa sachai sabad bairaago raam |
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, the soul dwells in the home of the self; through the True Word of the Shabad, she becomes unattached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੋ ਸਚਿ ਬੈਰਾਗੋ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: mukh masatak bhaago sach bairaago saach rate veechaaree |
lines.english: By the destiny written upon their foreheads, they become truly unattached, and by reflective meditation, they are imbued with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਬਉਰਾਨਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa sabh jag bauraanaa sabade haumai maaree |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the whole world is insane; through the Shabad, the ego is conquered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਮਤਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੋਹਾਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: saachai sabad laag mat upajai guramukh naam sohaago |
lines.english: Attached to the True Word of the Shabad, wisdom comes forth. The Gurmukh obtains the Naam, the Name of the Husband Lord.
